'''âg-r-s''' ('''kagaras''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbarrass|imbarrass]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbarrass|imbarrass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-r-s
|-
! Lemma
| kagaras
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigaras|thigaras]] || [[word:jigaras|jigaras]] || [[word:shigaras|shigaras]] || [[word:kigaras|kigaras]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugaras|thuthugaras]] || [[word:jujugaras|jujugaras]] || [[word:shushugaras|shushugaras]] || [[word:kukugaras|kukugaras]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugaras|thugaras]] || [[word:jugaras|jugaras]] || [[word:shugaras|shugaras]] || [[word:kugaras|kugaras]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugaras|thugaras]] || [[word:jugaras|jugaras]] || [[word:shugaras|shugaras]] || [[word:kugaras|kugaras]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegaras|thegaras]] || [[word:jegaras|jegaras]] || [[word:shegaras|shegaras]] || [[word:kegaras|kegaras]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogaras|thothogaras]] || [[word:jojogaras|jojogaras]] || [[word:shoshogaras|shoshogaras]] || [[word:kokogaras|kokogaras]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogaras|thogaras]] || [[word:jogaras|jogaras]] || [[word:shogaras|shogaras]] || [[word:kogaras|kogaras]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogaras|thogaras]] || [[word:jogaras|jogaras]] || [[word:shogaras|shogaras]] || [[word:kogaras|kogaras]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgaras|thĂŠgaras]] || [[word:jĂŠgaras|jĂŠgaras]] || [[word:shĂŠgaras|shĂŠgaras]] || [[word:kĂŠgaras|kĂŠgaras]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagaras|thathagaras]] || [[word:jajagaras|jajagaras]] || [[word:shashagaras|shashagaras]] || [[word:kakagaras|kakagaras]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagaras|thagaras]] || [[word:jagaras|jagaras]] || [[word:shagaras|shagaras]] || [[word:kagaras|kagaras]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagaras|thagaras]] || [[word:jagaras|jagaras]] || [[word:shagaras|shagaras]] || [[word:kagaras|kagaras]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagaras|shagaras]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagaras|goshagaras]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagaras|gokishagaras]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagarasnĂŒ|shagarasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagarasnknĂŒ|goshagarasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagarasnĂŒ|gokishagarasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagarashĂ«|shagarashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagarasnkshĂ«|goshagarasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagarashĂ«|gokishagarashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagarasro|shagarasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagarasnkro|goshagarasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagarasro|gokishagarasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagarasmu|shagarasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagarasnkmu|goshagarasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagarasmu|gokishagarasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagarasher|shagarasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagarasnksher|goshagarasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagarasher|gokishagarasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagarasng|shagarasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagarasnkng|goshagarasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagarasng|gokishagarasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagarasya|shagarasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagarasnkya|goshagarasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagarasya|gokishagarasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagarasyam|shagarasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagarasnkyam|goshagarasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagarasyam|gokishagarasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagarasnĂŒshĂ«|shagarasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagarasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagarasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagarasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagarasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagarasnĂŒro|shagarasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagarasnknĂŒro|goshagarasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagarasnĂŒro|gokishagarasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagarasnĂŒmu|shagarasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagarasnknĂŒmu|goshagarasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagarasnĂŒmu|gokishagarasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagarashĂ«nĂŒ|shagarashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagarasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagarasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagarashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagarashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagarashĂ«ro|shagarashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagarasnkshĂ«ro|goshagarasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagarashĂ«ro|gokishagarashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagarashĂ«mu|shagarashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagarasnkshĂ«mu|goshagarasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagarashĂ«mu|gokishagarashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagarasronĂŒ|shagarasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagarasnkronĂŒ|goshagarasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagarasronĂŒ|gokishagarasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagarasroshĂ«|shagarasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagarasnkroshĂ«|goshagarasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagarasroshĂ«|gokishagarasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagarasromu|shagarasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagarasnkromu|goshagarasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagarasromu|gokishagarasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagarasmunĂŒ|shagarasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagarasnkmunĂŒ|goshagarasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagarasmunĂŒ|gokishagarasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagarasmushĂ«|shagarasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagarasnkmushĂ«|goshagarasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagarasmushĂ«|gokishagarasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagarasmuro|shagarasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagarasnkmuro|goshagarasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagarasmuro|gokishagarasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
